validation.failed: The request could not be validated.
validation.field_errors: One or more fields are invalid.

auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

client.bad_request: The request could not be understood.
client.unsupported_media_type: The request content type is not supported.
client.payload_too_large: The request body is too large.

query.order_by_field_not_allowed: Field '{field}' is not allowed in order_by. Allowed: {allowed}.

filter.relation_depth_exceeded: Invalid filter key '{key}': only one relation level (a single '.') is supported.
filter.field_not_allowed: Field '{field}' is not allowed for operator '{operator}'. Allowed: {allowed}.
filter.related_field_invalid: Field '{field}' is not a column on related model '{model_name}' (filter key '{filter_key}').

resource.not_found: The requested resource was not found.

user.not_found: User with id {id} was not found.
user.username_taken: This username is already in use.
user.email_taken: This email is already in use.

system.internal: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
system.unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
